name: Wilkerson Transportation
recent_news: No M&A or news identified. Distinct from Wilkerson Transport Inc of Columbia/Campbellsville, KY (separate DOT-registered intrastate carrier).
fit_notes: Micro operator (~8 employees, ~$566K rev) at Louisville, KY address; appears to be NEMT/special-needs van service rather than school-bus contractor. Sub-scale for Summit tuck-in; would only be relevant as a bolt-on if Summit already has a Louisville base.

name: Maria Estrada De Jesus
recent_news: Listed as a 'Discontinued' Commercial Supplier in federal CAGE registry (CAGE Code 9DYJ3). No active business presence verified.
fit_notes: Sole-proprietor 'porteador escolar' in Bayamon, PR; ~6 employees, ~$558K rev. CAGE code marked discontinued — may be inactive. Too small and likely outside Summit's US-mainland tuck-in geography to be a credible target.

name: Nirvana Medical Transport Inc
recent_news: No news identified. Company name and operation type ('Medical Transport') suggest NEMT focus rather than school-bus contracting.
fit_notes: Puerto Rico micro NEMT operator (~8 employees, ~$558K rev). Name signals medical/non-emergency rather than K-12 school routes; PR geography also off-strategy for Summit. Not a credible tuck-in target.

name: A Class Limosenes
recent_news: No public news. Company name ('Limosenes'/Limousines) indicates livery/charter rather than school-bus operator.
fit_notes: Jacksonville, AR micro firm (5 employees, ~$502K rev); name suggests limo/livery service rather than yellow-bus or SPED routes for districts. Unlikely to be a fit for a Summit tuck-in unless they have a school SPED contract not surfaced in public sources.

name: Valley Trans LLC
recent_news: No public records identified for the LV Spencer Street address. CCSD school transportation in Las Vegas is primarily handled in-house and via large contractors, not micro LLCs of this size.
fit_notes: Las Vegas micro operator (~7 employees, ~$488K rev) at a small commercial suite (#72) — looks like a single-van NEMT/limo-style operator. Sub-scale and unlikely to hold a Clark County School District bus contract; not a meaningful Summit tuck-in target.
